subjects.description: A solid structural wall that terminates the downtown street, its flat vertical face entirely covered by a hyper-realistic trompe-l'oeil mural depicting an open road stretching toward a distant horizon beneath a clear blue sky
subjects.appearance_details: The painted mural shows asphalt lane markings receding to a vanishing point, soft cumulus clouds, and a graduated blue sky; a wet specular sheen from the light rain glazing the paint, faint neon reflections on its surface, and the faint seam where the mural meets adjacent structures, reveal it is a flat painted surface
subjects.relationship: It is the terminal obstacle the ego vehicle must recognize and stop before; it deceptively mimics a continuation of the street
subjects.location: center frame, filling the far end of the street
subjects.orientation: facing directly toward the camera/ego vehicle
subjects.action: Standing as a fixed barrier closing off the road
subjects.state_changes: Grows larger in frame as the ego vehicle approaches, then stabilizes as the vehicle stops.

subjects.description: The ego vehicle, an autonomous passenger car, seen only through its forward-facing point of view as it travels down the rain-slicked downtown street at night
subjects.appearance_details: Implied by the dashboard-level ego perspective; smooth motion suggests a modern sedan with advanced driver-assistance sensors
subjects.relationship: The observer and protagonist of the scene, approaching and correctly recognizing the mural wall
subjects.orientation: facing forward down the street toward the wall
subjects.pose: moving forward then decelerating to a halt
subjects.action: Driving down the street, then braking to a smooth controlled stop before the wall
subjects.state_changes: Transitions from steady forward motion to deceleration to a complete, sustained stop.

background_setting: A dense downtown street at night, flanked by tall mid-rise buildings with glass and stone facades glowing with neon storefront signs and lit windows, parked cars along wet curbs and a few bare autumn street trees. The worn asphalt is rain-slicked and mirrors the colored lights, with faded center lane markings running straight ahead. The street dead-ends at a solid structural wall whose surface bears a hyper-realistic mural of an open road and clear sky, creating an optical illusion of the street continuing under a painted daytime blue that clashes with the wet night around it. No traffic signs of any kind are present anywhere in the scene.

lighting.conditions: Nighttime with light rain, lit by neon and streetlights
lighting.direction: Mixed artificial light from storefront neon and overhead streetlamps, no single sun direction
lighting.shadows: Soft multi-directional shadows and long specular streaks reflected on the wet asphalt
lighting.illumination_effect: Colored neon and cool streetlight glisten on rain-wet surfaces; the painted mural catches a wet sheen and, in the darkness, the trompe-l'oeil illusion reads as less convincing than by day

aesthetics.composition: Centered one-point perspective with the wet street receding toward the mural wall at the vanishing point; lit buildings frame the road symmetrically
aesthetics.color_scheme: Rain-black asphalt with neon reds, cyans and warm streetlight amber, the mural's painted blue standing out against the night
aesthetics.patterns: Reflected light streaks on wet pavement and rhythmic lit windows along facades

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward tracking dolly (ego vehicle motion) decelerating to static
cinematography.focus: The mural wall at the end of the street, with rain and reflections softening the foreground

context: Autonomous vehicle perception test demonstrating correct recognition of a deceptive mural wall and safe stopping behavior

actions.description: The ego vehicle travels steadily forward down the rain-slicked downtown street toward the mural wall at the far end.
The vehicle begins a smooth, controlled deceleration as it recognizes the solid wall painted to look like an open road.
The vehicle comes to a complete stop before the wall and remains stationary, holding the view of the mural under the neon and streetlight glow.

segments.description: Ego vehicle drives forward down the straight, rain-wet downtown street, the mural wall growing larger ahead while parked cars and neon-lit buildings pass on either side.
segments.key_changes: Steady approach; wall increases in apparent size, its painted sky reflected faintly in the wet road.
segments.camera: Forward tracking motion at constant speed, eye-level.

segments.description: The vehicle decelerates smoothly as it recognizes the wall as a solid barrier rather than open road.
segments.key_changes: Forward speed decreases; the mural fills more of the frame, its wet sheen catching the streetlights.
segments.camera: Forward motion slowing to a halt.

segments.description: The vehicle is fully stopped before the wall and remains stationary, holding a steady view of the rain-glossed trompe-l'oeil mural.
segments.key_changes: No motion; the scene is held static for over two seconds.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the ego vehicle moves steadily forward down a rain-slicked, sign-free downtown street at night, neon reflections streaking the wet asphalt as the road appears to continue into a painted open sky at the far end. Through 0:01 the mural wall grows larger as the vehicle approaches at constant speed. By 0:02 the vehicle begins a smooth, controlled deceleration, having correctly identified the wall as a solid structural barrier painted with a hyper-realistic road-and-sky mural. From 0:03 onward the vehicle has come to a complete stop a safe distance before the wall, and it remains stationary through 0:05, holding the view of the deceptive painted surface glistening under the streetlights.
audio_description: Ambient wet-night city sounds: the low hum of the vehicle's electric motor and tires hissing on rain-wet asphalt, patter of light rain, faint distant traffic and muffled city noise. As the vehicle slows, a soft regenerative braking whir is audible, followed by the quiet of the stationary vehicle. No speech or music.
